sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنَ الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second pillar of Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الصَّلَاةُ نُورٌ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الطَّهَارَةِ، حَدِيثٌ رَقْمُ ٢٢٣].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Namaz je svjetlost' [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o čistoći, hadis br. 223].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Prayer is a light' [Narrated by Muslim in the Book of Purification, Hadith No. 223].

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْمُسْلِمُ مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ الصَّبْرَ وَالنِّظَامَ فِي حَيَاتِهِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman kroz namaz uči strpljenje i disciplinu u svom svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim learns patience and order in their daily life through prayer.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يُصَلِّي الْمُؤْمِنُ بِخُشُوعٍ، يَشْعُرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّكِينَةِ فِي قَلْبِهِ.
sentences.translation: Kada vjernik klanja skrušeno, osjeća odmor i smirenost u svom srcu.
sentences.translationEn: When a believer prays with humility, they feel comfort and tranquility in their heart.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نُحَافِظَ عَلَى الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ فِي أَوْقَاتِهَا الصَّحِيحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zato moramo čuvati pet dnevnih namaza u njihovo pravo vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we must maintain the five daily prayers at their correct times.
